review_text: Francisco is awesome.
Francisco was the best! We also loved the robot waiter for the entertainment value!
Great service and fun night!
Katy did a wonderful job...
Wait staff rocks, Patio rocks, marg rocks, queso rocks, burritos rocks. Hot slapper ftb. I go to Mexico all the time for work, this food is on par with the homies down south. Get you some.
Meghan was great!
Toquito the robot brought out our food playing a nice Spanish tune. My boy Christian gave us excellent service as well. Very tasty would recommend.
Christian was a beast, helluva waiter. Would totally recommend my guy to anybody. Best server in the nation. Toquito was also a beast, played a huge role in the food coming out.
Great food and always excellent service!!
Megan is so sweet and nice and I love the food here so much. Also has DELICIOUS vegan options!
Megan was great! Thank you!!! We’ll be back for sure!!
Came after some google reviews! Megan was great! Drinks were definitely good as well! Thank you for the suggestion!
Best Mexican food around.
Megan was great! Good service and food.
Megan took very good care of us today! Great service. Good food!
Service slow, food cold, drinks overpriced and not good. Will not return.
Francisco was so nice and the food came fast.  He also allowed me to feed my new bee friend Barry.  Barry loved the margarita.
Server was so slow.  Food cold. Drinks were awful (skinny margarita)

Ordered a carry out thru Uber Eats last night. Food was horrible! Ordered a burrito and all that came was the insides…..no tortilla shell!! Quesadillas were extremely soggy and bland. Worst meal ever!!
Quesabirria was fantastic! Our waitress Megan was great ⭐️
Food was delicious, service was incredible, and Megan was the best!! Definitely coming back.

definitely my go to spot! i feel welcomed every time.
the food is so yummy, especially the quesabirria tacos!
the frozen margaritas are really good as well, half off monday-friday from 3pm-6pm, who doesn’t love a good $5 marg??? strawberry and mango are the best! the staff is super friendly, and give the best suggestions!
thank you fenin!
Excellent food and experience. Francisco was too notch.  Highly recommended!
We love Francisco!!! He was attentive and fun. The food was great and the drinks were delicious. Los Tres has been and will continue to be our Go-To restaurant for a night out.
Great food, lovely music. Shout out to Megan for being a great waitress. Nice place to visit for a chill atmosphere

do NOT order takeout from this restaurant at all, food was 30 minutes late and the portions were very noticeably lesser than usual, I could see mostly tin and it was very sloppy. They do not care about your order if you're not in the restaurant. Go somewhere else for takeout
Megan is an amazing bartender!!!! Food is great too!!
Great service from Daniel H! Would come again!
Daniel H was amazing!!
Always a great experience at this location! Love the happy hour specials and the Birria tacos.
Margs are fire
Server was great, friendly

Me and my family had dinner here last night and everything was perfect. The food was fresh flavorful and came out hot, exactly what you want from a great Mexican restaurant. The guacamole was very fresh some of the best we've had and the enchilada Supremes were absolutely delicious we also enjoyed some great margaritas and the fajitas as well everything was a 10 out of 10. Are waitress Katie went above and beyond to make sure we had a great experience. She was friendly attentive and had great recommendations from the menu you could tell she really cares about her customers! The restaurant was very clean and the decorations made for a perfect vibe! Highly recommend this place great food great service and great vibes will definitely be back soon!
Megan was the best.
DANIEL H DID AMAZING JOB THANK YOU SO MUCH.
Megan, the server is top notch. She anticipated our every need and paid attention  to our special needs daughter like no other server has. She is not only a great server but a wonderful person.
Francisco was Aah-mazing!!!!! Margaritas were delicious and Francisco made sure our table was taken care of!

This is my first time visiting this location and it did not disappoint! The service was amazing and quick!! Order came plated to perfection! Some of the best consommé I’ve had with quesabirrias. The margarita was great too!! Definitely recommend!
We had great service with Megan today for lunch
Came here for my birthday it was so nice and the everyone sang happy birthday to me🥳❤️ food was amazing and good lunch specials. AND MEGAN WAS THE BEST EVER
Shout out to Alberto! This place is great.

🧡🖤Me and my family came in today for a birthday and she loved it. We loved the food and the servers even sang happy birthday in spanish. Food amazing , fast service & AMAZING MARGS. You have to try the Skinny margaritas or the pineapple grilled marg. We will be back in a few days . 🧡🖤 Attentive servers and smiling faces all around. Check it out you won't be let down.
We came during happy hour and left very happy! Our server, Megan, was awesome and deserves a raise 🔥🔥🔥

We are locals to the area so we've been here more than once but the hospitality is always excellent the food is authentic and delicious and Francisco today during our visit did an excellent job we appreciate them very much
Always a good time
Katie is amazing! Great food amazing service.
Good food and great service.
My waitress, Megan, was the best! I really enjoyed her service. She was so kind, attentive and efficient. I of course enjoyed my food as well! I come here often and I always have a great experience.
Excellent entrees. Generous portions. Relaxing atmosphere.
We had a tremendous server, Katie, who was extremely friendly and did a great job taking care of our needs. The food was solid.
Megan was great. She check on us periodically and made sure the food was perfect! Will definitely be coming back!
Megan is the best waitress ever!! Food is so good and I will keep coming back because Megan is the best ever!!
Megan was great! Always enjoy happy hour at Los Tres Amigos.
Great food, and the trivia is fun to engage in while you’re there.
Francisco was great! Robot was dope 🤘
Great spot, great tasting food, but good took too long to get to the table and service was very slow.
Megan was great! Food was great!
Megan was wonderful!!! Great happy hour and great experience!! Would definitely be back. Cheers!
I love tequilla

Went here for dinner, we order a few dishes. Two vegetarian dishes and two normal dishes. Restaurant was pretty empty when we came. Very nice aesthetics inside. We had order a vegetarian dish and asked for things to not be put inside our food as we didn’t like them, when receiving the order, they didn’t listen and put everything in it. We sent it back and told the server to take it back and bring it how we ordered it. After sending it back, that one dish took over 20+ minutes to get to the table which is really unpleasant when everyone was eating. We noted we had allergies and they wrote it down. But after my family has their food, they felt sick afterward. I ordered the big burrito, cheese had no flavor, the lettuce inside the wrap was soaking wet and tasted like chemicals. Upon reviewing the bill, they charged us for sides that we didn’t want. Very unpleasant experience. Manager told us that they can’t remove stuff off the items in the menu and charged us for something we didn’t want which is ridiculous. You should put in the menu that you can’t change or alter the items on the menu. If you dont like something, they will put it as a side and charge you for it. Manager didn’t even try and help us with anything. Don’t charge us for something we didn’t want. We won’t be back.
Katie was a great server!
Great place for good food!
Megan’s service was great!
The food was kinda cold, chesse wasn't even melted. Actually the last few time we've been here t he food wasn't very good.

Our server Megan was the best!! She was so nice and funny and also very attentive and made sure our table was satisfied the entire time. Also love the new chairs and tables they are so nice! Make sure to request Megan’s section next time you come she will make your time the best.
Megan was amazing! Best server ever! Very attentive and very cool. Always love coming here and she made this the best time yet

We love tres amigos. The food is great. Our last few visits the service has been poor.
The waiter delivered 2 of 3 meals then asked what 3rd person ordered. 5 minutes later, said he has put in wrong item. Eventually we got the correct 3rd meal and a brief apology. Other restaurants where something like this happens you might get a discount to 'try and make it right' not here.
Previous outing my husband got stung by a bee sitting at an indoor table. He wanted to get home and we waited a long time for our check. We told the waiter, there was no "are you ok" just a long wait to get our bill
Great lunch, great service.  Thanks
Francisco was a great waiter, he was very attentive. Food was great and we will be back.

We went with a large group. Everything was great! Our server Francisco was fabulous!
Only thing I wish was a little better was the salsa.
Francisco our server was excellent.    Always fun

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
My son and I love this place. We always end up filling up on the chips and salsa before the food even comes...the salsa’s got a nice little kick and it’s always fresh. The prices are fair, the portions are great, and the food never disappoints. I also love the tables and chairs with the restaurant’s name etched into the backs. It gives the place a really cool, authentic touch. Solid spot to dine in and enjoy a good meal every time.
I went and got a chorizo taco salad and my chorizo was burnt up and they charge extra for it
Atmosphere is good, our waiter Christian was attentive
Amazing food, as always! Christian was very attentive. Thank you for adding a delicious spot to the community.

My girlfriend and I come here once, sometimes even twice a week! Definitely one of our favorite spots here in the canton/deerborn area. I recommend getting the burrito maya and my girlfriend always goes for the quesabirrias! They also have great drinks! Lenin and Christian are a great server duo!
Food and service was great!
very friendly and on time with everything
Very efficient and sweet
Great service, very friendly and great at recommendations.
Amazing food and great service as always. Been going to this place for 10 years and it never disappoints. 🌮
Jose is a great server !!! We love coming here ! The food and service is incredible !

Always a great place to come to the food is spectacular the restaurant is extremely clean and the staff is very friendly. Jose is an excellent waiter with perfect customer service and a great smile. We'll definitely come back. Extremely satisfied customers.

Niko did an incredible job serving a last minute very large party, him and David the manager were friendly and accommodating! The food for everyone was very good. Thank you Los Tres Amigos canton for your help pulling off our party!
good service and food
Daniel has the best serves
My favorite Mexican restaurant with great service!!

I had a nice time with the residents at my job, Waltonwood Carriage Park. I ordered the taco salad and it was NOT what i was expecting. It’s one of my favs that i get from Rams Horn. They brought me a taco shell with mostly peppers and onions and a FEW pieces of chicken. 😢 the shell was soggy at the bottom so it wasn’t edible. I asked for a fajita taco i believe and it appeared that they threw it all in the flour tortilla. I would have wanted the tortilla a lil more crispy. While i don’t like to complain i will probably never be back. However, Francisco treated us well, was so kind and helped keep the door open while we transported the residents out.
David did a wonderful job!
The service here is fast and phenomenal. It’s always an amazing meal!
Fantastic service, food is always delicious and served quickly at the best temp. Lennon was our server today and was super personable, attentive and friendly. Always a great time.
very good food

Excellent service
Quick, friendly service. The queso fundido was so good with the tortillas, and also with the chips, both mild and spicy salsas were excellent. The quesabirria was phenomenal, so  fresh and flavorful.
The service from the waiter David was excellent and the food was spectacular. I highly recommend it.
The food was delicious. It was served quickly and it was fresh. The service was great, server Alberto was very friendly and quick
The staff is so kind! Thanks for making our daughters birthday soecual
Great service and food, always!!
Wonderful and friendly staff, & fantastic food!! So yummy!
Francisco gave us a great dining experience at los tres amigos and the food was delicious! I always make sure to stop here when I am visiting the area.

Christian was amazing!

We went there for lunch on our vacation and had a great time with the food and cocktails. I highly recommend everything; it's delicious and reasonably priced.
Amazing food, love the service. Christian was out service, very charming and helpful!

Tres Amigos Cantón completely exceeded my expectations. The food was flavorful, fresh, and beautifully presented. The restaurant has a great vibe—comfortable, clean, and perfect for relaxing and enjoying a good meal. Everything we ordered arrived in a timely manner.

A special shoutout to our server David. His service was outstanding. He was polite, attentive, and made sure we felt taken care of from start to finish. His friendly attitude and great customer service really stood out and made the whole experience memorable.
I hate Mexican food but loved this place, and that says something!
Always enjoy a night out at Los Tres, Canton. Daniel H was a great server!

I visited Tres Amigos Cantón and was extremely satisfied. The food was delicious, served hot, and the portions were generous. The atmosphere is clean, welcoming, and perfect for enjoying a meal with friends or family. Everything came out quickly and the service was well organized.
Great food and great service.
Wonderful experience for dinner! Daniel was quick and friendly. All of our food prepared exactly the way we ordered. Service and food is always consistent. We look forward to returning soon!
We had Alberto as our server tonight, and everything went great! His service was attentive, and the food was delicious. We love this location and will definitely return!
Great lunch!
Lenin was fabulous!! Helped a friend with her surprise announcement and was great at keeping the secret till all arrived. Thank you Lenin!!!
Food was great, service was top tier! Lenin was so helpful!
Lenin is the best!
Lenin was awesome!
Very good service! Very attentive. Quick with their food service. Looked cleaned and even the bathrooms smelled cleaned. Great place
Daniel had amazing customer service and always are sure our waters were refilled.
Daniel was a great waiter! And the food was good!

After a long, stressful day of shopping at IKEA, Los Tres Amigos in Canton was the perfect place to unwind! My fiancé was in desperate need of a margarita, and this spot delivered. The staff was incredibly friendly and engaged, including the manager and our server, who also doubles as their marketing director—he even let us try a sample of their frozen margaritas before ordering.

The restaurant has a unique touch with a serving robot that helps carry food, talks, and plays music, which made the experience even more fun.

The food was fantastic. I had the shrimp tacos, and the marinated cabbage was a standout. My fiancé had the shredded beef tacos, full of rich flavor. Even the refried beans were amazing!

If you’ve had a long day (especially after IKEA!), this is a great place to stop, relax, and enjoy some seriously flavorful Mexican food. Five stars all the way
Francisco was great and personable!!!!
The food is always fantastico and Daniel is an amazing server!
Fantastic food and incredible service would come back every day if I could!
I ordered the quesabirria and it was excellent. Everything we ordered was great. And Christian was attentive and quick.
Daniel was an awesome server. The food was great! Our group had a great time!
Our server (Daniel) was very attentive and friendly. Food was delicious. Had a great time with my girlfriends.
Daniel was great! Thank you!
Great service
We love this spot! Very friendly and fun!
Food was great. Waiter was attentive and polite.
My corn tortillas were moldy :( I cannot possibly eat here or recommend this place to anyone.

Stopped in here for dinner yesterday with my significant other. Prices are insane! We were charged $11.50 for a small side of queso for the chips. (El Patio and Taqueria Victoria charge $4.00 and you get a larger portion of queso). My partner asked to add cilantro to his burrito.  $1.75 for cilantro! When I asked to speak with a Manager, the gentleman said he was the Manager. When I asked for help to make sense of the prices on these items, he then said he was not the manager and that the manager was not in the building. I was just trying to get clarification and an understanding on how the heck queso and cilantro were so priced out. I'm unclear if there was a language barrier since as I was explaining he made me feel like he did not understand what I was asking, then threw his hands up as if he didn't understand or just trying not to help me understand the over-pricing. The longer the conversation went, the more frustrated I was getting bc as I spoke, he just kept looking at me with a blank face as if he didn't understand what I was saying or asking. At that point, it was best for me to just pay the bill and leave bc I was about to lose my temper.  Food is fairly decent but their price points on certain items are OUTRAGEOUS. Three servers were congregating at the hostess desk when we left and one of them said "see you again soon" which made me even more mad since I knew each of them heard me being upset about the bill.  My reply was simply..."No! No you won't be seeing me again!" Never again!
We had such a great time celebration a birthday today. Our waiter Francisco was so great. They all sang happy birthday to my cousin. He really made it a special day. Thank You.
I had the Fajita Nachos !! So good !!!

Loved their margaritas. They were super friendly. I ordered the shrimp it was delicious. The fish tacos fell a little flat with flavor. They need more seasoning but l still give them 5 stars.  We will definitely go back

Honestly the food was better than I had expected it to be - excellent, and Francisco the waiter was super kind and helpful, and even brought me a complimentary poblano relleno to try, which was delicious!
I dined solo, but will return with my family. I recommend this place 👍.
Francisco was a great server! He checked on our table many times to make sure we had everything we needed. The tacos were great, large portions that were very filling. Had a great experience.
Francisco was the best. Will be coming back! Delicious tacos.
Great for dinner and also has fun trivia
Trivia was great!
Delicious food and super nice staff. Definitely became my top Mexican place
Francisco did a great job at serving us. He did well accommodating our food modifications. He was also very kind and funny. We also enjoyed the music enabled robot!
Dinner was amazing and Francisco was a great server.
Francisco was awesome
Francisco did a great job accommodating our family dinner!
Fransisco was great!
Francisco was an excellent waiter and gave us great service. Thank you very much.
Food was great! Our waiter Francisco was attentive and kind. Highly recommend.

Quick service and good food. We completely missed requesting corn shells for our soft tacos, and they replaced them no question. I completely forgot to take a pic of the tacos because they were so good. Photo is of the tamales
Fast and friendly service, and food is hot!
Great food. Fransisco was a great server
Great dinner tonight. Francisco was an awesome server as well!
Christian was a great waiter!

Great food and a huge selection to choose from

Great food and service! Francisco was our server. He was very good!
Francisco was our server and he was very polite and attentive . He had tables all over the restaurant and I still had everything that I needed . 10/10 service !
Great good will be back real soon

Great restaurant, friendly staff, quick service.
Food is always superb. Plentiful and warm/ hot.  Even carryouts.
This place is sweet!
Francisco was wonderful!

So amazing! Francisco was amazing and super friendly. Food was fresh and super delicious. This was our first time here and it definitely didn't disappoint, will definitely be coming back again and will recommend to others.

The food and margaritas were Great✅
The green tea shots need help!
Francisco was great!!

All the food was delicious. Chips and salsa, enchiladas supreme (ground beef, chicken, cheese and bean) and chili relleno. Service was great, prompt, friendly our order was accurate. Refills for our drinks prompt. We enjoyed the sweet robot bring g the food out. So cool. Will be back. Thank you.
Francisco was our waiter super friendly and very polite
Linda was great!
The food was good everyone enjoyed the waitress, she was a robot!!
Francisco was a great waiter. He recommend some great dishes and the food was amazing!
Francisco was great!
Don't listen to Uma, this is the only place I enjoy tipping after I get my food. Elite service and always does me right. Always look forward to coming back!
love this place, I always come for the lunch specials. Such a good price for what you get, I’ll always come here instead of the Mexican Fiesta on Ford :)

We have been going to this place for the past 20+ years. We have seen the change in management, change in food quality from good to average to good, and yesterday when we went it was really poor. I ordered a spinach enchilada with red sauce. They brought it out with green sauce, but then realized their mistake and changed it. My husband got a chicken enchilada but the chicken wasn’t cooked properly so he requested them to cook it thoroughly, but they offered another dish, and same mix up with the green and red sauce request.
NOW THE WORST PART!!! Since we did not have a good experience my husband did not give a tip. But when he checked his credit card statement today he noticed they have added a 20% tip without our authorization!!!! This is fraud and stealing!!!! Will not go there again and will definitely complain to better bureau of business!!
chicken was dry and sides like rice and guacamole were hard
A great experience! Francisco was so attentive. Food was very good. They were busy yet timely eith everything. We'll be back!
Our server, Francisco, was awesome!!! He was super fun. Our food was great. We will be back and we're asking for Francisco!!
Our server Francisco was amazing and taught us Spanish!
Francisco was great!
Great service! Tasty food!
came in during a slow lunch with not too many people, Francisco took such great care of us!! and everyone is so nice plus food IS FIRE 🔥 amazing 🤩

I got a to go order of Enchiladas Suprema
And the beef enchilada was stuffed with fake beef, some kind of soy beef substitute.   I know beef is expensive but thats shady especially since I’m allergic to soy.   How could I tell?  Ground beef isn't stretchy for one thing.   It just wasn’t actual hamburger, trust me.    Plus the veggie beef substitute is on the menu and in the kitchen.   Clearly they are swapping it out to save money and hoping people won’t notice.  Be forewarned.

Honestly the food wasn’t that great either.   I usually eat at the chain restaurant in Ann Arbor and their food is much better.

Came here for dinner with my mother..and ordered the fajitas amigos..and I had to literally search for the chicken and steak I had vegetables piled high and no meat less than 8oz of chicken and steak combined for 23bucks was not worth the combined presentation period..who is cooking back there? Seriously

Jose was AMAZING. he was so nice and polite. he got us our food quickly and it tasted amazing. I would recommend Los Tres Amigos to anyone who wants a great experience. And they got taquito the robot and he’s so cute!
Great food and friendly staff
Food, Margaritas and service was fantastic! It was really busy tonight and the employees were doing a fabulous job keeping up with the rush
Everything was good but the beans and rice beans from a can and rice was not good and the proportions were small for the price
Robot server was pretty cool. Nice, clean place. Good was great

A great local Mexican restaurant with a delicious raspberry margarita in a glass that resembled a swimming pool. I had the Enchiladas Tapatias, which were tasty. The atmosphere is the biggest winner though.
Good before but overcooked tough chicken in frahitas. . Hard to chew.
Always good
Amazing margaritas and food! Francisco was very attentive. We come here often and are never disappointed.
Great food!
Will come back next time

Our family loves this restaurant. The staff is quick to accommodate seating for a large group. The food is fresh and delicious. Service is quick even for a large order. Great vibes, definitely recommend this restaurant!
Came for margaritas & tacos and was not disappointed! Our server, Reese, was charismatic and attentive! The margaritas were divine! Would recommend.
Reese was our server and was fantastic. Food was great as usual!
Francisco was a courteous and pleasant server. Food was good. We had the fajitas for 2, we had plenty left overs.
Good

To loud for people with Hearing aids, even the person I was with said it was very loud and he doesn't wear hearing aids. The music was way too loud! I did not think the food was good at all. The chips were stale and the dinner that I got wasn't bad but it's nothing that I would want to run and go back to again. I'll never go there again. It was that bad. And not at all worth the price that we paid.

Tasty meals for all of us and our waiter Francisco was great as well!
What a great day to sit outside! The staff is very friendly and accommodating. The food was great as well the margaritas.

Had a wonderful meal on the patio at Los Tres Amigos in Canton. Jose was a great host. We were the first to enjoy their newly renovated patio! Looking forward to more relaxing evenings and delicious food outside!

Francisco was so great! Absolutely fantastic, best service around and I've had alot of service. Tremendous guy, very great time with friends and family.

Daniel was great I also had another sever before and he was great as well amazing drinks amazing food pleasant environment give them business yall love it here and will be coming back 10 outta 10

Francisco was great. This is the best location! Canton, MI!

Came at lunchtime with a party of 12, two tables of 6. Virtually the only ones in the entire restaurant.  1 basket of chips and salsa per table and never once offered to refill. Took a long time to get the food and drinks were not refilled.  Maybe it was because we came the day after Cinco De Mayo and the employee's were hung over? Food was still good, the service could have been better.  Also, I think the bathroom temperature is set at 40° F. 🥶
Francisco was amazing in the midst of Cinco de Mayo chaos 😊

Waited in line to be seated for over an hour on Cinco De Mayo. The restaurant was basically empty with plenty of tables open. The restaurants management stopped seating IN HOUSE CUSTOMERS to prioritize online orders. Kept telling us 20 minutes and then told
Us an hour and a half. Never have seen such a horribly ran restaurant. Will never come back.
Margaritas!!!!!!!!   Great food, great food. Ask for Fransisco he was awesome.
Wonderful waiting staff, delicious food, affordable prices, authentic selection, wide variety of options. I will definitely be back again and again! 🇲🇽

The food was good. Portions were good. Didn't like the cheese they used on the quessabarria.

Where they lose me is using robot servers. Why am I leaving a good tip if a machine is doing the work? But it is not the wait staffs fault... I rather spend my money where my tips actually come with human service.
Great service with David

We had Dorieliz as our server and she did an amazing job! She was extremely quick giving our food, and clearing our plates when we were done. I would definitely come back and the food was super tasty!
Great service. Always a good time!
Excellent service and good food.
Francisco was very attentive and friendly.  We had a great experience!!!

Today, my family and I came to Los Tres Amigos on Canton Center Rd and had an awesome experience! Not only was the food really good, but the service provided by Dorieliz was superb! She truly catered to our needs and even told us about the new Mangonada Margarita that they had. When I tell this margarita was the BEST I’ve had! I’m a margarita lover, but this was sooooo good. I highly recommend it to anyone who loves margaritas! You won’t be disappointed!
Great food and drinks
Mangonada margarita my favorite drink it’s a new one it’s good for a hot days
The food and the service was excellent and the mangonada margarita it’s a good drink and the server name pancho was a great person
Love Los Tres! It’s our favorite place! The staff is friendly, the food is great and the margaritas are the best around! Love the patio in the summer time. Thank you
The food was good. They had some difficulty getting my wife’s order correct. Trivia was fun
jose was great
Fransisco was great. Very friendly and attentive. Foods always good.

Absolutely terrible, fiance went with her mother because Mexican Fiesta was closed, she ordered the tacos, they told her the shells were homemade, thats a lie,  they're clearly store bought Ortega Shells, werwnt even fried, and ha dno flavor at all, she ate half of one and didnt touch it agian after, absolutely terrible.

Slow service, fish tacos not well seasoned, cold and dry rice.  Beef tacos all carte were OK.

Years ago I gave this place 5 stars.  Now twice in a row I've been sat and ignored, while tables sat after mine were served.  Asking a passing employee if they could send our server over didn't help either time.  Requests to speak to a manager were met with shrugs.  Find somewhere else for your taco and marg fix.
Great food!

Food did not have any flavor to it .
Service okay…I chicken tacos and got beef instead.

We met David today at Los Tres Amigos, and he made a Mangonada Margarita for us!! This margarita was amazing! The flavors blended really well, and the tajin and chamoy were a great addition to this already flavorful margarita! When you come to Los Tres Amigos, check out David at the bar! He will hook your margarita UP! Thank you, David, for a great experience!
Great good- service was a1
As always these guys are super!  Can't go wrong here!   Love this place.  You guys are AWESOME!
Great food and great service from Francisco! We will be back!
Francisco was an awesome waiter! The food was great and it was a true authentic Mexican atmosphere. Definitely going to be going here again 💯🙂
Francisco was a great waiter!!!

This place has the potential to be really good but it's inconsistent. The wife and I went for Taco Tuesday today, and the tacos hardly had any meat.  It felt really skimpy even for $2 each. They used to be generous with their portions. We also had to argue for them to include the green and spicy salsas, which they used to include no problem. Neither of us had a good experience unfortunately.

Ridiculous. I came in last night with a party of 11 at 7PM. Took the server 25 minutes just to take our drink order. Then another 45 minutes just to have our food come out, come to find out they’re out of steak, fries, beans, and quite literally everything we wanted to order. We were not notified that in the beginning either. I understand having a new server, but why put that sever on a party of 11 with 5+ kids? Won’t be coming back to this location ever again. We spent 100+ dollars, and absolutely no apology from our original server.
Food was great, service was aewsome.. would be cool if our waiter didn't vape while in the kitchen which is in clear view of customers. Used his vape with his gloves on as well. Not cool
Emmanuel is amazing so attentive, helpful, and prompt. The food was amazing

If you enjoy waiting an extra 30 minute for your food this is your place due to and I quote "we got hella people in here".

Not the first time this has happened, just go somewhere else.
I recently ordered food for catering for my daughter’s graduation party. The food was perfect and they were right on time for the pick up. We could not have been more pleased.
